case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP vs. GARCIA, GILDARDO et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, GILDARDO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-14-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-15-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-24-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-14-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-14-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-13-1994, OFF CALENDAR
